prompt:
Use 100% of the face and body from my reference image. Create a cinematic winter scene with a side face close-up view, inspired by a Minecraft death screen. The person is lying face up in the snow, wearing casual winter clothing, in a realistic pose, with cool atmospheric lighting, slightly desaturated tones, and visible footprints in the snow. Surround the person with floating or placed pixelated objects in the Minecraft style, including a diamond sword, bow, pickaxe, emerald, steak, Eye of Ender, music disc, and a mob of spiders. Add a realistic Minecraft "You Died!" overlay on top with pixel font, including "Score: 0," the reticle symbol, and two retro UI buttons labeled "Respawn" and "Title Screen." Naturally blend the realistic photography with pixel-art game elements. Soft shadows, melancholic winter aesthetic, ultra-detailed, vertical composition, DSLR realism, subtle depth of field, high contrast, 9:16 aspect ratio.

Negative Prompt:

"Low quality, blurry face, distorted body, extra limbs, incorrect facial features, cartoonish body, unrealistic"
